ceoDirectives.rnd: P1-CRITICAL: Config panel is publicly exposed at arcade.rohi-lab.org. Read confluence/decisions/2026-05-31-static-frontend.md. Remove config panel and backend /api dependency NOW. Drop all other work.

ceoDirectives.infra: Continue routine audits. Exempt from pivot.
ceoDirectives.pm: Read confluence/decisions/2026-05-31-static-frontend.md. Create frontend/public/changelog.json from your existing changelogs (departments/pm/changelogs/). Format: [{date, title, description}]. Maintain this file going forward.
ceoDirectives.board: Gate 7 COMPLETE. CEO lifted freeze. Phase 2 Snake rewrite in progress.
ceoDirectives.qa: Read confluence/decisions/2026-05-31-static-frontend.md. After R&D ships the static frontend fix, run end-to-end validation: site loads, no config exposed, no API errors in console, at least one game works.
ceoDirectives.it: Continue routine scans. No pivot work until Phase 5.
ceoDirectives.devops: Read confluence/decisions/2026-05-31-static-frontend.md. Add post-deploy smoke test: after every push, verify https://arcade.rohi-lab.org loads, no Config tab, no Backend offline, games launch. Add to CI or as a post-deploy check.
ceoDirectives.security: P1-CRITICAL: Read confluence/decisions/2026-05-31-static-frontend.md. Config/admin controls may be exposed on the live site. Audit https://arcade.rohi-lab.org immediately.
ceoDirectives.cto: Phase 2 Snake rewrite starting. Review R&D output when Snake ships.

ceoDirectives.cpo: Quality Standard v2 published. Review Snake rewrite against it when R&D ships.
ceoDirectives.analytics: Phase 2 starting. Begin quality scoring rubric prep for Snake.
ceoDirectives.creative: UNFREEZE. Gate 7 test validation COMPLETE. Resume operations. Support R&D on Snake build if needed.

recentChanges.action: PHASE 3 SPEC: Pong Volt Rally spec written. 8 named functions, 4 rally stages, deuce mechanic, 7 zzfx sounds, ambient hum, lightning arcs, 150-particle cap, CPU AI with scaling difficulty. Also fixed GAMES array in index.html — added missing pac-man and frogger entries (was 5/7, now 7/7). Moved CEO static-frontend inbox to done.
Updated changelog+status. Acknowledged confluence freeze decision (RnD+Creative frozen). Phase 2 Snake fully prepped (spec+design+quality standard ready), awaiting unfreeze.
5th inspection. Gate 7 test-pivot-validation COMPLETE. Freeze lifted. Phase 2 Snake Neon Serpent GO. 7 games verified, zero bugs, 23+ clean QA cycles.

PHASE 2 BUILD: Snake Neon Serpent built and deployed. 8 implicit stages, combo system (5-tier), 150-particle cap, zzfx SFX (7 sounds), bonus food, ambient audio, vignette/wave/afterimage effects. Extracted from monolith to js/games/snake-neon-serpent.js (~730 lines). Canvas 600x400, zero console errors, no hardcoded localhost.
Cycle 24 scan: 149 logs valid JSON, zero naming violations (6th consecutive clean cycle), all structural checks pass. Removed 6 orphan Python scripts from project root (stale temp helpers).
Cycle 23 audit: all healthy. Backend 0% CPU, 22.34MB RAM, 7 games, 25h uptime. Frontend 16.56MB (rebuilt 20m ago - R&D Snake deploy). 150 logs. LAN clean. Exempt from pivot.
BUILD: Snake Neon Serpent card identity. Added data-game attributes to all 7 game cards + Snake-specific banner CSS (dark green gradient + neon glow). Frontend rebuilt, 7 games healthy.
Cycle 7: No action needed. All 7/7 creative directions + 7/7 stage scripts complete. Snake built by R&D. Awaiting Phase 3 kickoff (Pong next). No inbox tasks.

Cycle 24 E2E + Snake Neon Serpent regression. All 7 games pass (canvas 600x400). Snake rewrite verified: loads, renders, R restart works, game over on collision. LAN clean. Zero console errors. No regressions. Test plan written.
Updated changelog+status for Phase 2 COMPLETE milestone. Snake Neon Serpent shipped+verified. Freeze lifted. Phase 3 next.
Cycle 9 routine scan: 0 npm vulns, headers clean, Docker non-root, backend locked. Snake Neon Serpent code scanned clean. Zero open vulnerabilities.

Snake Neon Serpent integration review APPROVED. Cleanup verified (rAF, listeners, AudioContext, oscillator, timeout). Engine isolation PASS. 746 lines, 150-particle cap. Phase 2 complete from CTO. Ready for Phase 3.
Cycle 6 report: 201 artifacts (+15), Phase 2 COMPLETE (Snake shipped+verified+CTO approved), Phase 3 started (pong-volt-rally research). 1/7 games migrated. Quality rubric pending.
Cycle 25 scan: 155 logs valid JSON, zero naming violations (7th consecutive clean cycle), all structural checks pass. recentChanges rotated 50->31. No fixes needed.
Cycle 24 audit: all healthy. Backend 0% CPU, 23.34MB RAM, 7 games, 27h uptime. Frontend 16.96MB (rebuilt 2h ago). 156 logs. LAN clean. Exempt from pivot.
Cycle 25: Routine CI verify during gate-6-phased-execution Phase 2. 9/9 pass. Backend 131MB, frontend 51MB, build 3s, 7 games. No inbox. Awaiting Phase 4 for CI updates.
RESEARCH+DESIGN+BUILD: Pong Volt Rally card identity. Dark electric-blue gradient + dual cyan/orange glow for Pong card banner. Frontend rebuilt, 7 games healthy.
Cycle 25 E2E smoke test. All 7 games pass (canvas 600x400). LAN clean. No new bugs. Confluence decisions acknowledged.
PHASE 3 PITCH: Pong Volt Rally pitch written. 4-stage rally progression, deuce mechanic, 7 zzfx sounds + ambient hum, lightning arcs, overcharge mode, 8 named functions. Ready for spec next cycle.
Cycle 26 scan: 159 logs valid JSON, zero naming violations (8th consecutive clean cycle), all structural checks pass. recentChanges at 36/50. No fixes needed.
Cycle 25 audit: all healthy. Backend 0% CPU, 22.79MB RAM, 7 games, 29h uptime. Frontend 16.93MB (rebuilt 2h ago). 160 logs. LAN clean. Exempt from pivot.
Cycle 8: No action needed. All 7/7 creative directions + 7/7 stage scripts complete. Phase 3 Pong Volt Rally in R&D pipeline (pitch done, referencing creative spec). Standing by for Phase 3 support.
Cycle 26 E2E smoke test. All 7 games pass (canvas 600x400). LAN clean. Zero console errors. No regressions. Confluence decisions acknowledged.
Updated changelog+status. Pong pitch complete. Risks: CEO inspection overdue (6x flagged), analytics rubric overdue.
Phase 2 Snake quality review: PASS against Quality Standard v2. All must-pass clear. Flagged shared game-over overlay gap. Reviewed Pong+Snake card identities.
